2604.12290.title: Frontier-Eng: Benchmarking Self-Evolving Agents on Real-World Engineering Tasks with Generative Optimization
2604.12290.paper_summary: Current LLM agent benchmarks, which predominantly focus on binary pass/fail tasks such as code generation or search-based question answering, often neglect the value of real-world engineering that is often captured through the iterative optimization of feasible designs. To this end, we introduce Frontier-Eng, a human-verified benchmark for generative optimization -- an iterative propose-execute-evaluate loop in which an agent generates candidate artifacts, receives executable verifier feedback, and revises them under a fixed interaction budget -- spanning $47$ tasks across five broad engineering categories. Unlike previous suites, Frontier-Eng tasks are grounded in industrial-grade simulators and verifiers that provide continuous reward signals and enforce hard feasibility constraints under constrained budgets. We evaluate eight frontier language models using representative search frameworks, finding that while Claude 4.6 Opus achieves the most robust performance, the benchmark remains challenging for all models. Our analysis suggests a dual power-law decay in improvement frequency ($\sim$ 1/iteration) and magnitude ($\sim$ 1/improvement count). We further show that although width improves parallelism and diversity, depth remains crucial for hard-won improvements under a fixed budget. Frontier-Eng establishes a new standard for assessing the capacity of AI agents to integrate domain knowledge with executable feedback to solve complex, open-ended engineering problems.
2604.12290.paper_summary_zh: 目前的 LLM 代理基準主要集中在二元通過/失敗任務上，例如代碼生成或基於搜索的問題回答，往往忽略了通過可行設計的迭代優化所捕捉的現實工程價值。為此，我們介紹了 Frontier-Eng，一個經過人類驗證的生成優化基準——一個迭代的提議-執行-評估循環，其中代理生成候選工件，接收可執行的驗證者反饋，並在固定的互動預算下進行修訂——涵蓋了五個廣泛工程類別中的 $47$ 個任務。與之前的套件不同，Frontier-Eng 任務基於工業級模擬器和驗證者，這些模擬器和驗證者提供持續的獎勵信號並在受限預算下強制執行嚴格的可行性約束。我們使用代表性的搜索框架評估了八個前沿語言模型，發現雖然 Claude 4.6 Opus 實現了最穩健的性能，但該基準對所有模型仍然具有挑戰性。我們的分析表明，改進頻率（$\sim$ 1/iteration）和幅度（$\sim$ 1/improvement count）呈現雙重冪律衰減。我們進一步顯示，儘管寬度提高了並行性和多樣性，但在固定預算下，深度對於艱難獲得的改進仍然至關重要。Frontier-Eng 為評估 AI 代理整合領域知識與可執行反饋以解決複雜的開放式工程問題的能力建立了一個新標準。
2604.12290.author: Yizhe Chi et.al.
2604.12290.authors: Yizhe Chi, Deyao Hong, Dapeng Jiang, Tianwei Luo, Kaisen Yang, Boshi Zhang, Zhe Cao, Xiaoyan Fan, Bingxiang He, Han Hao, Weiyang Jin, Dianqiao Lei, Qingle Liu, Houde Qian, Bowen Wang, Situ Wang, Youjie Zheng, Yifan Zhou, Calvin Xiao, Eren Cai, Qinhuai Na
